---
title: "Week 6: Functional programming"
summary: "Use functional programming patterns, function arguments, and function factories to write cleaner code."
prepare: "Read the functional programming chapter and arrive ready to discuss reusable function design."
resource_label: "Advanced R functional programming"
resource_url: "https://adv-r.hadley.nz/fp.html"
focus:
  - "Functions as values"
  - "Function arguments and closures"
  - "Function factories"
  - "Writing reusable, composable code"
---

```{r}
week <- 6
source(here::here("course_info.R"))
```

```{r}
#| output: asis
show_week_overview(week)
```

## Main reference

* [9-11. *Advanced R*](https://adv-r.hadley.nz/fp.html)

## What you will learn this week

* Functions
* Function arguments
* Function factories

```{r}
#| output: asis
show_slides(week)
show_assignments(week)
```
